Plantation Home Loans

FHA loans in Plantation, Florida

Plantation is a well-established, centrally located Broward suburb, with mature tree-lined neighborhoods, the larger lots of Plantation Acres, and convenient access across the county. Its mix of single-family homes and townhomes draws families and professionals, and Broward County's high-cost FHA limit gives those buyers extra borrowing room.

Broward County FHA limit (1-unit)$667,000

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Plantation

Broward County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Plantation homes than in most of Florida. Confirm Broward County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. That higher limit helps Plantation buyers finance single-family homes and townhomes, with only larger luxury properties tending to exceed it.

FHA in established, central Plantation

Plantation's central location and established neighborhoods make it a steady FHA market. Single-family homes are straightforward FHA purchases; for townhomes and condos, confirm the building/association is FHA-approved (or qualifies for Single-Unit Approval) via our condo guide. Many of Plantation's older homes are great candidates, and ones needing updates can use an FHA 203(k) loan.

Down payment help for Plantation buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Plantation buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Broward County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Plantation

We help buyers throughout Plantation and Broward County, including Plantation Acres, Jacaranda, and Central Park. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Plantation (Broward County) for 2026?+
Broward County is a high-cost area, so its 2026 FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Plantation a good FHA market?+
Yes — its established, central-Broward neighborhoods and the county's higher FHA limit make it a solid fit for FHA buyers.
Can I buy a Plantation townhome with FHA?+
Yes, if the building/association is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval. We verify before you offer.
How much down payment do I need in Plantation?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits up to 6% can help.
Do you serve all of Broward County?+
Yes — Plantation, Davie, Sunrise, Fort Lauderdale, and surrounding communities.
